ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution being evaluated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the institution */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the institution */,
  "evaluation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution being evaluated */,
  "criteria_b1" TEXT /* Result for Criteria B1 */,
  "criteria_b2" TEXT /* Result for Criteria B2 */,
  "criteria_b3" TEXT /* Result for Criteria B3 */,
  "criteria_b4" TEXT /* Result for Criteria B4 */,
  "criteria_b5" TEXT /* Result for Criteria B5 */,
  "criteria_b6" TEXT /* Result for Criteria B6 */,
  "verdict_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the verdicts table */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes from the evaluators */,
  "lc_rx" TEXT /* Special conditions (if any) related to the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation took place */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_verdict_id FOREIGN KEY ("verdict_id") REFERENCES verdicts ("verdict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criteria */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criteria being evaluated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criteria */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the criteria in the overall evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verdicts" (
  "verdict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verdict */,
  "verdict_name" TEXT /* Verdict name (e.g., passed, cleared pass) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the verdict */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verdict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remarks" (
  "remark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remark */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation record */,
  "remark_text" TEXT /* Content of the remark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the remark was added */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who added the remark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remarks_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Status name (e.g., pending, completed, in progress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "evaluation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the evaluation */,
  "verdict_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the verdicts table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_verdict_id FOREIGN KEY ("verdict_id") REFERENCES verdicts ("verdict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., evaluator, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the institution being evaluated
Unique identifier for each evaluation record
Reference to the institution being evaluated
Foreign key referencing the verdicts table
Remarks or notes from the evaluators
Special conditions (if any) related to the evaluation
Date when the evaluation took place
Name of the criteria being evaluated
Weightage of the criteria in the overall evaluation
Date when the remark was added
Username of the user who added the remark
Status name (e.g., pending, completed, in progress)
Unique identifier for each history record
Foreign key referencing the verdicts table
Role of the user (e.g., evaluator, administrator)
